Through original programming, documentaries, and expert-led discussions, MHTN aims to increase awareness, provide valuable information, and encourage open conversations about mental well-being.

programme.title: Quo Vadis TV
programme.desc: Quo Vadis TV is committed to sharing the Biblical message in a way that makes Christian living practical, realistic, and attainable. Our theme is summarized the question: "where are you going?" Our Aim with this inquiry is to help people find orientation and find the path back to God.

Our theme is summarized the question: "where are you going?" Our Aim with this inquiry is to help people find orientation and find the path back to God.

programme.title: Orígenes: Diseño inteligente en la genética
programme.desc: Un programa donde se explican los orígenes del planeta y la creación de la Tierra. Además, los métodos de datación de los minerales y otros tópicos respaldan la creencia de un diseño inteligente.

programme.title: Educando Para la Eternidad
programme.desc: Espacio para hacer conciencia sobre los diferentes roles sociales en cuyas manos está el papel de educar en el nombre de Dios.

programme.desc: Se procura equipar e inspirar a jóvenes a ser embajadores cristianos en sus respectivos lugares de trabajo y estudio.

programme.title: Cuerpo y Espíritu Aeróbicos
programme.desc: Información de estilo de vida saludable con sesiones de ejercicios aeróbicos de intensidad baja a moderada.

programme.title: Las avenidas del alma
programme.desc: Una mirada a los métodos y tácticas que Satanás utiliza a través de los cinco sentidos humanos para llevar a las personas al pecado y corromper sus vidas.

programme.title: Anclas de la Verdad
programme.desc: Un programa con temas muy interesantes sobre las Sagradas Escrituras, llevando el mensaje de Dios.

programme.title: Los niños también alaban
programme.desc: Los niños cantan y alaban al Señor.

programme.title: Los niños también alaban
programme.desc: Los niños cantan y alaban al Señor.

programme.title: Cocina con color
programme.desc: Priscilla y Patricia hacen recetas saludables, nutritivas, divertidas y llenas de color y sabor, fáciles y divertidas.

programme.title: Viva En Abundancia
programme.desc: La salud mental y física, cómo llevar una vida el equilibrio y estar al tanto de los mecanismos de prevención.

programme.title: 3ABN Hoy En Vivo
programme.desc: Diferentes temas de interés basados en las enseñanzas bíblicas con la asistencia de pastores adventistas.

programme.title: La vida, la muerte y la resurrección
programme.desc: Serie de estudios bíblicos centrados en la perspectiva cristiana y adventista sobre el ciclo de la vida, el estado de los muertos y la esperanza de la resurrección.

programme.title: Mejor Cada Día
programme.desc: Los problemas que aquejan a la salud y cómo reconocerlos y buscar los mejores recursos para su mejoría.

programme.title: Maravillosa creación
programme.desc: Ciencia y salud, ejercicios, dieta balanceada, consejos para contrarrestar sus problemas físicos y mejorar, con la participación de médicos y expertos.

programme.title: Escrito está
programme.desc: Un programa cristiano internacional de televisión que se dedica a compartir el entendimiento de la palabra de Dios con las personas de todo el mundo.

programme.title: Primicias
programme.desc: La lucha entre el periódico y el canal de noticias es permanente, cada uno trabaja duro por conseguir la primicia. A la cabeza del diario, Américo Baigorria trata de poner paz entre sus propios empleados.

programme.title: Vence
programme.desc: Respuesta a los problemas de la actualidad, las adicciones, el abuso, las crisis extremas y sin salidas.

programme.title: Dios y la mujer del siglo 21
programme.desc: Un espacio para sanar a través de ayuda profesional y reflexiones espirituales, ayudando al público con sus miedos e inseguridades.

programme.title: Descubriendo los Símbolos del Apocalipsis
programme.desc: Serie profética que estudia el Libro del Apocalipsis como revelación de Jesucristo, cómo buscar la fe y la esperanza.

programme.title: Los mensajes de los tres ángeles
programme.desc: Distintos referentes exponen temas donde se explican y aclaran mensajes relevantes para el día de hoy.

programme.title: Hay Esperanza
programme.desc: Sermones que reflexionan sobre la palabra de Dios, lectura de textos que enseñan lecciones de vida y muestran un camino de luz.

programme.desc: Estudio bíblico, devocionario que reflexiona sobre la palabra de Dios y el sentido en la vida de los hombres.

programme.title: Valora y mejora tu salud
programme.desc: Se presentan temas relevantes y educativos. Se cuenta con diferentes expositores.

programme.desc: Un programa que ayuda a unir a las familias por medio de la oración intercesora. Un grupo de damas comparte experiencias vividas como mujer soltera, mujer casada, como madre y abuela.

programme.desc: Métodos para mantener un cuerpo sano, diferentes expertos explican los problemas de salud en el mundo de hoy.

programme.desc: Lectura de diferentes pasajes de la Biblia con la participación del público que sugiere los pasajes bíblicos.

programme.title: Guest of the day
programme.desc: This is France 24 HD

programme.title: Forty Guns
programme.desc: (1957) Western. Barbara Stanwyck stars as a cattle rancher who, with her hired guns, rules a town as if it were her own. But then a federal marshal (Barry Sullivan) arrives on the scene.

programme.title: Winchester '73
programme.desc: (1950) Western. James Stewart stars as sharpshooter Lin McAdam, who wins a Winchester rifle. But a murderous rival steals his prize, so McAdam sets out on an epic journey in pursuit.

programme.title: Von Ryan's Express
programme.desc: (1965) Second World War adventure. Frank Sinatra stars as the leader of Allied prisoners of war attempting to slip the clutches of their Italian captors. Co-starring Trevor Howard.

programme.title: Daddy's Home
programme.desc: (2015) Comedy starring Mark Wahlberg, Will Ferrell and Linda Cardellini. A man's living happily with his wife and stepchildren - until the kids' biological dad swaggers back onto the scene.

programme.title: Kingsman: The Secret Service
programme.desc: (2014) Action-comedy with Colin Firth, Taron Egerton and Samuel L Jackson. A London teenager is introduced to a secret society of immaculately dressed agents that exists to save the world.

programme.title: Jennifer's Body
programme.desc: (2009) Gory horror starring Megan Fox and Amanda Seyfried. A macabre ritual literally turns a cheerleader into a man-eater. Can her nerdy friend save the day?

programme.title: I Am Not a Witch
programme.desc: (2017) Rungano Nyoni's BAFTA Film Award-winning satirical drama. In a rural Zambian village, a quiet, serious-looking girl is accused of witchcraft. In Nyanja/Bemba/Tonga/subs.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: The Son of Robin Hood
programme.desc: (1958) Swashbuckling adventure starring June Laverick. Robin Hood is dead and his band of followers seek a worthy new leader. And they get one who exceeds all their expectations.

programme.title: Prince Valiant
programme.desc: (1954) Swashbuckling adventure. One of King Arthur's courtiers, the Viking Prince Valiant (Robert Wagner) uncovers the evil Sir Brack's (James Mason) plot to kill the king. Can he foil him?

programme.title: The Desert Fox
programme.desc: (1951) Drama. James Mason stars in Henry Hathaway's sympathetic portrait of Field Marshal Erwin Rommel in the final years of his life during the Second World War. With Jessica Tandy.

programme.title: The Tall Men
programme.desc: (1955) Western. Clark Gable plays a Civil War veteran who, with his brother (Cameron Mitchell), accepts the role of trail boss on a huge cattle drive for a crooked cattleman (Robert Ryan).

programme.title: The Adjustment Bureau
programme.desc: (2011) Romance meets sci-fi thriller. Matt Damon and Emily Blunt star as a politician and a dancer who begin to suspect that a shadowy group of men are interfering with their lives.

programme.title: Transporter 3
programme.desc: (2008) Violent action-thriller with Jason Statham. Terrorists hire a courier to drive a kidnapped woman across Europe, on a journey that gets ever more dangerous.

programme.title: Knock at the Cabin
programme.desc: (2023) M Night Shyamalan's jarringly intimate end-of-days horror with Dave Bautista. An armed group insist that a family of three must make an impossible life-or-death choice.

programme.title: Other People's Children
programme.desc: (2022) Affecting drama with Virginie Efira as a single woman in her late 30s who wants children, and is falling in love with a man and his four-year-old daughter. In French/subs.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: The Heiress
programme.desc: (1949) Oscar-winner Olivia de Havilland is joined by Montgomery Clift and Ralph Richardson in William Wyler's dark psychological romance, adapted from Henry James's novel Washington Square.

programme.title: Anzio
programme.desc: (1968) Epic Second World War drama starring Robert Mitchum. A reporter gets trapped behind enemy lines during the costly 1944 Allied invasion of Italy. With Peter Falk and Robert Ryan.

programme.title: Tora! Tora! Tora!
programme.desc: (1970) Oscar-winning drama portraying the bombing of Pearl Harbor, from both American and Japanese perspectives. With Joseph Cotten and So Yamamura.

programme.title: A Knight's Tale
programme.desc: (2001) Modern swashbuckling medieval action adventure starring Heath Ledger, Shannyn Sossamon and Paul Bettany. A lowly squire jousts his way to the top, with help from Geoffrey Chaucer.

programme.title: Good Luck to You, Leo Grande
programme.desc: (2022) Drama starring Emma Thompson as a recently widowed, retired teacher who has a sexual bucket list she wants to get around to now that she has the time and, perhaps, even the energy.

programme.title: Widows
programme.desc: (2018) Steve McQueen's thriller follows the widows of some serious criminals as they mount a daring heist. The star-studded cast includes Viola Davis, Colin Farrell and Michelle Rodriguez.

programme.title: On the Come Up
programme.desc: (2022) Jamila Gray stars as Lil' Law- a struggling young rapper who wants to make her fortune to help her family in director Sanaa Lathan's hip-hop-battling-coming-of-fame drama.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Broken Arrow
programme.desc: (1950) Western starring James Stewart. A gold prospector, tired of reprisal killings between whites and Native Americans, offers a truce to the Apaches' leader. But tensions resurface.

programme.title: Gun Fury
programme.desc: (1953) Western. Rock Hudson stars as a California-bound settler who must ride 1500 miles to the Mexican border to rescue his fiancée (Donna Reed) after she's abducted by an outlaw.

programme.title: Siege of the Saxons
programme.desc: (1963) Dark ages adventure. King Arthur is murdered and usurped by his champion knight (Ronald Howard), so an outlaw (Ronald Lewis) seeks the mystic Merlin (John Laurie) to right the wrong.

programme.title: Cleopatra
programme.desc: (1963) Drama. Elizabeth Taylor plays the Egyptian queen who, to protect her realm, uses political guile and her body to woo Julius Caesar (Rex Harrison) and Mark Antony (Richard Burton).

programme.title: Anna
programme.desc: (2019) Luc Besson's action-thriller about a young Russian assassin, with Sasha Luss. A scout offers Anna an opportunity to become a model in Paris, but can she escape her links to the KGB?

programme.title: Alita: Battle Angel
programme.desc: (2019) Partially animated action film based on a popular manga comic. Alita, a deadly cyborg brought back to life by a mourning scientist, sets out to discover her true identity.

programme.title: Sheroes
programme.desc: (2023) She-heroes: action-with-attitude. Three young women transform into a Generation Z version of Charlie's Angels to rescue their mate from a drug lord in Thailand. Cue guns and bikinis.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: Terror by Night
programme.desc: (1946) Sherlock Holmes murder-mystery starring Basil Rathbone and Nigel Bruce. Holmes and Dr Watson are employed to protect a priceless diamond. But it's snatched from under their noses.

programme.title: Annie
programme.desc: (2014) Jamie Foxx stars in this reboot of the 1982 musical. Orphan Annie is transported to post-2008 recession-hit New York, where she becomes the ward of a germaphobe running for mayor.

programme.title: Rosaline
programme.desc: (2022) Literary romcom with Kaitlyn Dever and Isabela Merced. This is the story of Juliet's cousin who gets dumped by Romeo at the start of Shakespeare's play... and she's not too pleased.

programme.title: Midway
programme.desc: (2019) Roland Emmerich's sprawling, action-packed war drama about the Battle of Midway, a major turning point in World War II. Starring Ed Skrein, Luke Evans and Woody Harrelson.

programme.title: Daddy's Home
programme.desc: (2015) Comedy starring Mark Wahlberg, Will Ferrell and Linda Cardellini. A man's living happily with his wife and stepchildren - until the kids' biological dad swaggers back onto the scene.

programme.title: Daredevil
programme.desc: (2003) Superhero fantasy. Ben Affleck is a blind lawyer who turns vigilante by night. Jennifer Garner plays his lover and Colin Farrell the villain who endangers them both. Strong violence.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity: Next of Kin
programme.desc: (2021) Found-footage supernatural horror. A young woman visits an Amish community to make a documentary about her family. But there's a good reason why her mum got her away from there...

programme.title: Titane
programme.desc: (2021) Palm d'Or-winning body horror with Agathe Rousselle. A killer with a complex and sexual relationship with cars must dramatically transform to escape her past. Adults only.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Squawk on the Street
programme.desc: Taking viewers onto the floor of the exchange, right to the posts where the big companies in the world trade; tick charts track the action of every trade of every stock; the treasury, currency and commodity action in real time.

programme.title: Money Movers
programme.desc: Anchors Carl Quintanilla and Sara Eisen focus on what is moving the stock markets, the agenda for the business day, detailed data on individual stocks, sectors and the indices that investors and traders want.

programme.title: Halftime Report
programme.desc: The front lines of market coverage; host Scott Wapner and the top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day.

programme.title: The Exchange
programme.desc: Anchor Kelly Evans reports on the important stories to markets and investors; reporters provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Power Lunch
programme.desc: Focusing on real-time market coverage, breaking news and up-to-the-instant stock moving information; delving into the economy, the markets, real estate, media and technology -- any place where there's money to be made.

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: A guide through the most important hour of the Wall Street trading day, and taking a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what's driving them and how investors are reacting; coverage includes reports from the CME Group, NASDAQ and the NYSE.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: Melissa Lee and Michael Santoli take you through all the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading; smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day.

programme.title: Fast Money
programme.desc: The information normally reserved for the Wall Street trading floor, enabling viewers to make decisions that give them a chance to make money; the news with an angle that won't be seen until tomorrow's papers.

programme.title: Mad Money
programme.desc: Taking viewers inside the mind of one of Wall Street's most respected and successful money managers; Jim Cramer guides viewers through the confusing jungle of Wall Street investing, navigating through both opportunities and pitfalls.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: An additive that makes coffee taste better; a way to increase focus while decreasing stress; a product to make kids enjoy brushing their hair; a follow-up with Tara Brown and Sleep Styler.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: Daniel Lubetzky guest sharks; an innovative cleaning alternative for every household; a reinvention of a childhood favorite; a surprising approach to skin care; an update on Dude Wipes.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A family-made Eastern European pierogi; a permanent fix for lost phone chargers; a kitchen fan that prevents "onion eyes"; a smart mini fridge designed for drinks.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: Life-sized, scientifically accurate animatronic dinosaurs; a caffeinated beverage inspired by Vietnamese heritage; beverage coolers; a tool that helps parents conquer potty training.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A teenage environmentalist has the answer to plastic bottles; a former soap opera actress seeks a deal for her one-piece swimsuit; exercise playlists; exposing what is lurking inside a mattress; checking in with Signal Vault.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A family-made Eastern European pierogi; a permanent fix for lost phone chargers; a kitchen fan that prevents "onion eyes"; a smart mini fridge designed for drinks.

programme.title: The Car Chasers

programme.desc: S01 E02 Plastic, Plastic, Everywhere Joining pro surfer Koa Smith to learn about the problem of microplastics on Oahu's North Shore; exploring what efforts are underway to fix the issue and innovative ways that entrepreneurs are utilizing what is being reclaimed.

programme.title: Journey to a New Earth
programme.desc: S01 E03 Before They Paved Paradise Dr. Isaiah Walker joins the conversation, showing the team the indigenous Ahupua'a system, how it engendered a truly great culture, and what it teaches about a more sustainable future.

programme.title: Journey to a New Earth
programme.desc: S01 E05 No More Bubbles Big wave surfer Kai Lenny and surfboard shaper John Pyzel join the journey, offering insights and challenging the problematic issue of single use plastic in shipping surfboards around the world.

programme.title: Journey to a New Earth
programme.desc: S01 E04 The GOAT 11-time World Surfing Champion Kelly Slater talks about his journey from pro surfer to ocean activist and creator of the sustainable clothing line Outerknown.

programme.title: Journey to a New Earth
programme.desc: S01 E06 Jaws Wes Carter ventures out for a swim with shark experts Juan and Ocean Ramsey; a conversation about marine life and the health of the oceans.

programme.title: Journey to a New Earth
programme.desc: S01 E09 No More Plastic The "New Earth" team delivers the first zero plastic prototype surfboard packaging kit to Pyzel headquarters in Southern California.

programme.title: Journey to a New Earth
programme.desc: S01 E08 Pipeline Team New Earth launches its new headquarters during the Billabong Pro Pipeline, showing the surf industry their final designs for a plastic-free New Earth product line.

programme.desc: So many cultures collide in New York City, it's no wonder there is a multitude of fantastic eateries and hidden gems within the walls of these three excellent restaurants.

programme.title: Fight to Survive
programme.desc: Faith, determination and human spirit abound in "Fight to Survive," which recounts stories of people's deadly ordeals in the outdoors. Accompanying survivors back to where harrowing events occurred is rock-climber Craig DeMartino, who is featured in the premiere episode. His right leg was amputated below the knee after a climbing accident, but he continued in his sport. In 2006 he became the first amputee to free-climb the 3,200-foot face of Yosemite's El Capitan in one day. Other stories tell of sailor Steven Callahan clinging to a raft in the Atlantic, fisherman Dean Ririe trapped by a boulder in icy water, and hiker Ted Porter falling into a glacial crevasse.

programme.title: Three Hours to Kill
programme.desc: The inhabitants of a small western community turn on Jim Guthrie (Dana Andrews) when he becomes the prime suspect for a murder he didn't commit. Before getting a chance to prove his innocence, Jim is driven from his home and into the wilderness, where he is left for dead. Despite the danger, he comes back years later, discovering that he's still a wanted man. But a kindhearted local named Chris (Dianne Foster) believes his story, and together they begin a desperate search for the true culprit.

His descriptions of the men he believes committed the crime, Smiling Man (Jack Elam) and Roper (Dave Kashner), fit those of two members of a rival family who were killed during a land fight years earlier. programme.title: Dropped: Project Origin
programme.desc: Alaska doesn't ask people to leave, she tells them to leave.

programme.title: JT Kenney's Florida Bass
programme.desc: Join pro angler JT Kenney as he embarks on an epic journey across Florida, navigating its diverse waters in pursuit of monstrous bass, showcasing the thrill of the chase and the beauty of the Sunshine State's landscapes.

programme.title: Lindner's Angling Edge
programme.desc: Jeremy Smith and Jeff Simpson prove not all fall crappies head for deep basins. Hair jigs in the weeds produce big slabs.

programme.title: Fishing 411
programme.desc: Ice Fishing for Walleye.

programme.title: Hook the Future
programme.desc: Capt. Don and his Grandson Tyler talk about memories and mishaps while landing Kingfish and Amberjacks out of Jacksonville, Fla.

programme.title: Art of Wild
programme.desc: Art of wild is a film series that aims to tell stories about the wild in the most cinematic way possible. To tell the best stories we travel to the most incredible places. It is in the wild places where most won't go that the human spirit is fed. Only a hunter knows what it's like to wake up with the woods, or hear a bull bugle in the graylight, these moments are what make up the beauty of the wild.

programme.title: MOJO TV
programme.desc: Chuck hunts with longtime friend Rob Reynolds of Ranchland Outfitters.

programme.title: Predator Pursuit
programme.desc: Jeff is hunting predators in West Texas.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Michigan conservation officers in the southeastern part of the state check on a man and his grandson on the opening day of firearm deer season and ponder a felony charge for a concealed handgun.

programme.title: Dead Meat
programme.desc: Chef Leysath travels to Florida in search of invasive, venomous lionfish off the coast of Ft. Lauderdale and hunts giant stingrays at night; both are taste-tested with surprising results.

programme.title: Guns & Ammo TV
programme.desc: Guns & Ammo TV is a weekly look at the latest products from the shooting sports industry. From product reviews to firearms training and competition, G&A TV has it covered.

programme.title: Reel Animals
programme.desc: Fishing captains search the coastal waters of southeastern U.S.

programme.title: Hook the Future
programme.desc: Capt. Don and his Grandson Tyler talk about memories and mishaps while landing Kingfish and Amberjacks out of Jacksonville, Fla.

programme.title: Heartland Waterfowl
programme.desc: With frozen ponds and stale birds, the crew grinds through the final week of Canada goose season at home; armed with ice ripplers, scouting, and determination, they carve out success one frozen waterhole at a time.

programme.title: Our Way of Life
programme.desc: Heather and Mike will demonstrate the cultural importance of Náxw, the traditional wooden halibut hooks used by Tlingit people for centuries.

programme.title: Relentless Pursuit
programme.desc: Join the Slock Master for an action-packed voyage into the past where primitive hunting is relived by the world's most recognized authority in spear and blowgun hunting. Laugh or cry, Tim Wells delivers every time.

programme.title: Pigman: The Series
programme.desc: Brian Pigman Quaca is a true-blue original—an unapologetic, high-energy host with a larger-than-life personality that has redefined outdoor television. With an unrelenting passion for the chase, Pigman takes on the world's toughest hunts, using any legal means necessary to put game on the ground. While his reputation was built on hardcore hog hunting, don't be mistaken-his skills extend far beyond wild pigs. From giant whitetails in the Midwest to red stag in New Zealand.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve's friends Janis and Papa Janis join him on a moose and caribou hunt in east-central Alaska that's the fulfillment of a lifelong dream.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: After early success on their moose and caribou hunt in Alaska, wild game has eluded Steve's party so he and Janis decide it's time to take action.

programme.title: Realtree's Monster Bucks
programme.desc: David Blanton gives advice on how and why to hunt Iowa.

programme.title: Backwoods Life
programme.desc: Kevin Knighton heads to Illinois with Buck Chasers and doesn't waste any time slinging arrows.

programme.title: Roger Raglin Outdoors
programme.desc: Roger takes his grandson on his first hunt and they successfully shoot coyotes and deer.

programme.title: Canada in the Rough
programme.desc: The Beasley Brothers document their hunting adventures across Canada.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Michigan conservation officers in the southeastern part of the state check on a man and his grandson on the opening day of firearm deer season and ponder a felony charge for a concealed handgun.

programme.title: The Given Right
programme.desc: Hunting is not a privilege, it is our God given right. Hunt always was, and continues to be integrally woven into the fabric of society. It is our goal to celebrate our God given right to hunt in each episode, and portray the passion we all have for this way of life. Follow Kenneth Lancaster, Mark Heck and Laden Force as they travel the country, exercising their God given right to hunt.

programme.title: Backwoods Life
programme.desc: Kevin Knighton heads to Illinois with Buck Chasers and doesn't waste any time slinging arrows.

programme.title: Everything Eichler
programme.desc: Fred Eichler takes viewers on thrilling bow and predator hunts, showcasing the complete field-to-table lifestyle alongside family, friends, and clients. As the host, Fred shares the daily trials of ranching, farming, and managing an outfitting business in Colorado. Expect extreme bowhunting and predator action, intertwined with the ups and downs of their authentic field-to-table journey.

programme.title: Bloodline Hunting
programme.desc: Travel with Matt Bullins as he journeys through grassroots America, seeking out new adventures and uncovering the rich bloodlines that define our hunting culture. Along the way, he highlights the people, histories, and experiences that keep these timeless traditions thriving.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass
programme.desc: Professional angler Ott DeFoe fishes heavy pads and grass mats in northern Florida: Follow his gameplan and tactics to pull a mammoth largemouth from the depths.

programme.title: A Fishing Story With Ronnie Green
programme.desc: Bobby Bakewell is a Bassmaster Classic qualifier who honed his fishing skills through countless hours on the water with his father. He shares how his dad's guidance and passion for the sport shaped his journey and success as an angler.

programme.title: In Fisherman TV
programme.desc: It's fast and frenzied fishing action for some of North America's most prodigious sportfish as the In-Fisherman staff takes you for mauling and brawling muskies; heading to one of North America's finest waters for giant smallmouth bass; taking you into the Alaskan wilderness to reveal the nature of record-class northern pike, including a 54-inch monster that's the biggest pike ever captured in almost 50 years of filming In-Fisherman TV.

programme.title: Bowhunter TV

programme.title: M2D Camo's Livin' the Dream
programme.desc: Sparky, AKA THE JOKER from Jokers Wild Outdoors, takes friends, family and clients hunting all over the world and on M2D CAMO Properties for wild exciting adventures.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's: The Professionals
programme.desc: An epic hunt in the mountains of Slovenia.

programme.title: Steve's Outdoor Adventures: Fishing with Wesley
programme.desc: Wesley White travels to Brazil to fish for peacock bass on the Rio Negro River.

programme.title: Let's Fish TV
programme.desc: Andrew Upshaw fishes for largemouth bass on Lake Naconiche.

programme.title: Catching Bass With Dustin Wilks
programme.desc: Accomplished angler Dustin Wilks fishes various bass fishing locations and teaches how to find and catch more fish. Loaded with fish catches, Catching Bass with Dustin Wilks is a show that is action packed and shows the viewer numerous techniques for catching bass. Dustin's straight forward approach coupled with his whimsical demeanor makes Catching Bass with Dustin Wilks the perfect teaching platform for anyone to be successful in bass fishing.

programme.title: Offroad Odyssey
programme.desc: Alexa and friends take a 100 mile SeaDoo ride and have a boat day with the pros on Lake Powell.

programme.title: Crossroads With the Burtons
programme.desc: NASCAR Xfinity Series driver Jeb Burton takes fans beyond the checkered flag in Crossroads with the Burtons, where high-speed racing meets the great outdoors. Join Jeb and his family as they embark on thrilling hunting and fishing adventures, all while championing conservation and land management. From the fast-paced world of NASCAR to the peace of nature, this series offers an exciting glimpse into Jeb's passions both on and off the track.

programme.title: Hit Squad Outdoors With Tim Sylvia
programme.desc: This week we have Eddie Roberts and Dave Passon in Canada looking for big black bears.

programme.title: Haymaker Hunting
programme.desc: In West Virginia, King, Brad Shingler, and Justin Rose face off against the wilderness, landing King's first powerful black bear in a heavyweight showdown.

programme.title: The Gamekeepers of Mossy Oak
programme.desc: This week, we're talking about grabbling catfish! Our guests Geoffrey King, Corey Stouts, and Ted Swords of North Mississippi are experts in the art of grabbling. Each has caught catfish over 70 pounds with their bare hands.

programme.title: Guns & Gear TV
programme.desc: Smith & Wesson, Tokarev and Wheeler Tools release new products for 2026; a lineup includes a review of current industry standards from EOTech and Black Hills Ammunition.

programme.title: Fishing With Roland Martin
programme.desc: Roland skips Salt E Sink Worms under shady docks for largemouth bass with a musky bonus.

programme.desc: Quail hunting with ladies behind the success of Southern Woods.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's: The Professionals

programme.title: Adrenaline
programme.desc: Experience the heart-pounding action of fair-chase whitetail hunting with host Kyle Wieter and the entire Adrenaline crew as they pursue giant Midwestern bucks. This dedicated team embraces the challenges of the hunt, navigating intense highs, unexpected lows, and the unpredictable nature of these ultimate survival machines.

programme.title: Winchester Deadly Passion
programme.desc: New Zealand offers some incredible hunts, and this episode highlights some of the very best adventures.

programme.title: MeatEater

programme.desc: Tommy reconnects with John Fee of Lund's Fisheries and they're talking scallops, a seafood auction, and the history of the number one commercial fishing port in America.

programme.title: Our Way of Life
programme.desc: Heather and Mike will demonstrate the cultural importance of Náxw, the traditional wooden halibut hooks used by Tlingit people for centuries.

programme.title: Dead Meat
programme.desc: Chef Leysath travels to Florida in search of invasive, venomous lionfish off the coast of Ft. Lauderdale and hunts giant stingrays at night; both are taste-tested with surprising results.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Hunting Adventures
programme.desc: Jim guides the famous WWE wrestler, Shawn 'The Heartbreak Kid' Michaels on Vancouver Island for giant black bears.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve travels to Tanzania for his first ever hunt in Africa.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Actor and comedian Joe Rogan joins Steve on a bowhunting expedition to the Great Basin of Nevada for skittish quarry: the high desert mule deer.

programme.title: Winchester Deadly Passion
programme.desc: New Zealand offers some incredible hunts, and this episode highlights some of the very best adventures.

programme.title: This Is Africa
programme.desc: Andy Buchanan and his team embark on adrenaline-fueled hunting adventures across Africa, showcasing the continent's most sought-after trophies while delving into the crucial role of hunters in wildlife conservation. Amidst epic hunts and breathtaking scenery, they address misconceptions about hunting and highlight the collaborative efforts of local communities, governments, and hunters to protect Africa's wildlife from the threats of poaching and human-wildlife conflict.

programme.title: Grace Camo and Lace
programme.desc: Grace, Camo & Lace follows the Armstrong sisters on hunting adventures across North America. While in pursuit of big and small game, Alli and Adriana bring a fresh look and youthful energy to the hunting industry. The sisters have been hunting since they were five years old and share a passion for hunting and the outdoor lifestyle. The entire Armstrong family gets in on the action as they join Alli and Adriana in bringing you entertaining, informative, fun-filled shows.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's: The Professionals
programme.desc: An epic hunt in the mountains of Slovenia.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Michigan conservation officers in the southeastern part of the state check on a man and his grandson on the opening day of firearm deer season and ponder a felony charge for a concealed handgun.

programme.title: Gun Stories
programme.desc: The gun that nearly beat out the Colt 1911.

programme.title: Everything Eichler
programme.desc: Fred Eichler takes viewers on thrilling bow and predator hunts, showcasing the complete field-to-table lifestyle alongside family, friends, and clients. As the host, Fred shares the daily trials of ranching, farming, and managing an outfitting business in Colorado. Expect extreme bowhunting and predator action, intertwined with the ups and downs of their authentic field-to-table journey.

programme.desc: With Baby Corp's stinkless serum in enemy hands, Turtleneck Superstar CEO Baby issues a challenge to deliver a new formula by 5 p.m.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: After struggling to relate to Shelby's interests, Lance tries to bond with her at a live-action role-play event; Lana tries to save the town garbage man's job when she finds out the mayor is replacing him with an automated garbage truck.

programme.title: Despicable Me
programme.desc: Supervillain Gru, a man who delights in all things wicked, hatches a plan to steal the moon. Surrounded by an army of little yellow minions and his impenetrable arsenal of weapons and war machines, Gru prepares to vanquish all who stand in his way. However, nothing in his calculations and groundwork has prepared him for his greatest challenge: three adorable orphan girls who want to make him their dad.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Doting father, horrible boss, rival to Plankton, money-loving owner of the Krusty Krab-- who could it be besides Eugene Harold Krabs?

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Patrick inducts SpongeBob into his prestigious society of dullards and doofuses; Patrick takes his grime to a new extreme, playing around in so much trash that he becomes unrecognizable.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Sandy's homemade snack becomes a big hit at the Krusty Krab; SpongeBob and Patrick's favorite comedy duo has a falling out on live television.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs has an accident and leaves SpongeBob in charge of the Krusty Krab; Patrick takes a job at the Goofy Goober when he finds out the employees get free ice cream.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick must search for Squidward after the inside of his home turns into a vast garbage jungle; in his latest secret formula scheme, Plankton disguises himself as a collectible figurine and winds up trapped in.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When Pat suddenly grows a grown-up beard, he decides it's time to act like a grown-up, too; while preparing to give an oral report for boating school, SpongeBob realizes that he's got a case of stage fright.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Gary is given a set of limbs to keep up with SpongeBob, but soon makes his owner look sluggish; Plankton practices ruling the world by shrinking himself and declaring himself king of SpongeBob's aquarium.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Once Fred's leg heals up, SpongeBob is determined to keep it out of harm's way; Patrick's lemonade stand is unsuccessful until he gets a secret ingredient from Squidward.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward joins a crew of sailors hunting down the great white jellyfish; Plankton finds a magic bean that takes him to a land of giants.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward gets left with a mess when SpongeBob and Patrick use carrier clams to send messages to each other; after cooking his kazillionth Krabby Patty, SpongeBob believes he's developed an allergy to them.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When a gang of kids steals the Krusty Krab's grill, SpongeBob and Mr. Krabs go to extreme lengths to win it back; SpongeBob helps out the Krusty Krab's night shift crew, but the customers crave something creepier than usual.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When Patrick discovers the pineapple's library, SpongeBob introduces him to the wonderful world of book learning; Plankton hasn't tried to steal the secret formula in a while, which makes Mr. Krabs nervous.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When Snow Yellow is deemed the Squarest of them all, the evil Queen Karen seeks to claim the title for herself by any means necessary.

programme.title: Despicable Me 2
programme.desc: Now that Gru has forsaken a life of crime to raise Margo, Agnes and Edith, he's trying to figure out how to provide for his new family. As he struggles with his responsibilities as a father, the Anti-Villain League, an organization dedicated to fighting evil, comes calling. The AVL sends Gru on a mission to capture the perpetrator of a spectacular heist, for who would be better than the world's greatest ex-villain to capture the individual who seeks to usurp his power.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica's high-school friend visits after leaving her fiancé at the altar.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica begins to feel the heat when she prepares dinner for her parents (Elliott Gould, Christina Pickles).

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon's latest scientific breakthrough leaves him feeling like a fraud; a romantic gesture between Howard and Bernadette causes Penny to up her game with Leonard.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When Professor Proton asks Leonard for help with an experiment, Sheldon retaliates by befriending Proton's rival, Bill Nye.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When a mistake comes to light, Sheldon makes Leonard walk a mile in his shoes; Penny decides to confront Raj's ex.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy and Leonard try to help Sheldon deal with his shame; Raj stays with Bernadette and Howard for a week.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: As Leonard tries to help Penny with a disappointment, Penny asks him a bold question about their relationship; Sheldon wants to learn how to be funny.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica finds it difficult to break up with her latest boyfriend (Geoffrey Lower), whom everyone likes; Chandler starts smoking again; Phoebe receives a large sum of money.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: While the men attend a hockey game and end up at a hospital, the women spy on President Clinton's top aide, George Stephanopoulos, who lives across the street.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler and Phoebe plan to dump dates on the same night at the same coffee house.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: An agent (June Gable) offers Joey a movie role as Al Pacino's naked body double; Chandler dates a liberal woman (Sofia Milos).

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler finds himself trapped in an ATM vestibule with model Jill Goodacre during a city-wide power failure.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: S01 E30 Feet of Clay The Cartwrights befriend a boy whose father has been sent to jail and whose mother has recently died.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S01 E30 Three-Legged Terror A young man wants an education despite his uncle's objection.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S01 E31 The Angry Man The young son of a neighboring rancher is seriously hurt in an accident.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S01 E32 The Woman The North Fork schoolteacher is pressured to leave town because of her progressive ideas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S01 E33 The Money Gun A hired gunman arrives in town to kill a man Lucas has hated for years.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: S01 E06 Misty Makes a Match Bubba and the guys are in for a busy week when they're called upon to capture a wild hog that has been getting into a neighbor's garden; Cody and Misty get serious about baby names; Booger goes on a blind date that Misty arranges.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: S01 E07 Frost Moves In The guys need a bigger tractor to plant winter grass, so Bubba builds a horse stall for a neighbor in exchange for the use of his tractor; Booger's relationship with Jaclyn gets serious; Cody moves forward with plans for his dream home.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S05 E22 Requiem at Mission Springs Mark is injured in an accident that leaves his legs paralyzed.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S05 E23 The Guest A stranger arrives on the McCain ranch claiming to be a friend of Lucas'.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: S02 E22 V Is for Vampire Count Sforza from Transylvania looks and acts like a vampire, which is enough to panic F Troop.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: S02 E23 That's Show Biz A rock 'n' roll group threatens to lure Agarn away from F Troop.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S01 E08 Bat Masterson & the Dodge City Dead Line: Part 1 Newspaperman Bat Masterson recalls his time as sheriff of Dodge City when he worked with Wyatt Earp to clean up the notorious frontier town.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S01 E09 Bat Masterson & the Dodge City Dead Line: Part 2 Newspaperman Bat Masterson recalls his time as sheriff of Dodge City when he tracked down the man who killed the town's beloved entertainer.

programme.title: Into the Wild Frontier
programme.desc: S01 E08 Jedediah Smith: Scholar and Survivor Jedediah Smith hopes to earn his living in the fur trade, but he is driven by an explorer's spirit; though badly mauled by a grizzly bear, the fearless mountain man goes on to explore more of the vast, uncharted American frontier than any other man.

programme.title: The Young Riders
programme.desc: S02 E06 The Littlest Cowboy After a gang beats him, Ike becomes depressed about his handicap until a terminally ill boy teaches him a valuable lesson about life.

programme.title: Maverick

programme.title: The Cowboy Way

programme.title: Think Big
programme.desc: Children are the future -- and so are their inventions, which is why "Think Big" could be an important show. It features young inventors competing to see who can come up with the most-innovative invention. Each episode features two teams in the Think Tank -- a studio filled with art supplies and construction materials -- who brainstorm and choose materials before sketching, designing and building a prototype to be presented to a judge, who determines a winner. The champions earn bragging rights and the coveted Genius Cup.

programme.title: America's Heartland
programme.desc: Much of the food Americans eat is produced by farmers and ranchers in the country's heartland, but many people don't know how it's produced. "America's Heartland" provides information about the people and processes responsible for the availability of food and fuel across the country and around the world. The show's reporters and producers tell stories in topics that include farm families, consumer issues, animal welfare and crop sustainability. Some episodes also take the show abroad to countries such as Egypt and Taiwan to show the impact American agriculture has on the global economy.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: The Victim
programme.desc: A rich woman (Elizabeth Montgomery) goes to her sister's house during a storm and is trapped inside with a killer.

programme.title: Designing Woman
programme.desc: Sports reporter Mike (Gregory Peck) and clothes designer Marilla (Lauren Bacall) meet and fall in love while on vacation. They marry on a whim, only to come to the shocking realization that they have very little in common. Mike is a blue-collar sports fanatic. Marilla is a high-society fashion diva. But when Mike writes a tell-all piece about a boxing promoter (Edward Platt) with mob ties, they have to overcome their differences to save both their relationship and Mike's life.

programme.title: Angel in My Pocket
programme.desc: After minister Sam Whitehead (Andy Griffith) moves to his new post in a small Kansas town, he finds that the place is in total gridlock because of a feud between the families of Mayor Will Sinclair (Henry Jones) and his rival Axel Gresham (Edgar Buchanan). Meanwhile, Sam's reckless brother-in-law, Bubba (Jerry Van Dyke), turns the church boiler into an alcohol still. Sam is ready to quit when his friend Art (Gary Collins) decides to enter politics in order to change the town for the better.

programme.title: The Fighting Buckaroo
programme.desc: A cowboy (Charles Starrett) helps a friend who was framed for stealing cattle.

programme.title: Smoke Signal
programme.desc: An Army deserter (Dana Andrews) and his girlfriend (Piper Laurie) shoot Grand Canyon rapids with his cavalry captors, chased by Indians.

programme.title: Ten Wanted Men
programme.desc: Rancher John Stewart (Randolph Scott) prefers to resolve problems without falling back on violent solutions. However, fellow cattleman Wick Campbell (Richard Boone) isn't so peaceful, and he hires a team of armed mercenaries, led by ruthless Frank Scavo (Leo Gordon), to rid him of any possible competition. After narrowly surviving an attack from Scavo and his men, Stewart has little choice but to fight back in order to save both his ranch and his family, including nephew Howie (Skip Homeier).

programme.title: Blood Alley
programme.desc: Chinese villagers free a merchant marine captain (John Wayne) from the communists to take them to Hong Kong in a stern-wheeler.

programme.title: Barabbas
programme.desc: Epic biblical tale about the criminal who was released by Pontius Pilate in preference to Jesus, prior to the Crucifixion. The action follows Barabbas after his lucky escape, his return to crime and his subsequent recapture and imprisonment in the sulfur mines. Based on the novel by Swedish writer Par Lagerkvist.

programme.title: The First Traveling Saleslady
programme.desc: In 1897 New York, Rose Gillray (Ginger Rogers) struggles to keep her corset business afloat. When Rose suggests that singer Molly Wade (Carol Channing) wear her daring new corset in her revue, the show is shut down. In debt to steel manufacturer Jim Carter (David Brian), Rose declares she can sell steel wire to stubborn cattle ranchers in Texas and clear her debt. Along the way, Rose is joined by Molly, inventor Charles Masters (Barry Nelson) and cattle baron Joel Kingdom (James Arness).

programme.title: The Fatal Mallet
programme.desc: Three men play dirty tricks to charm a beautiful young woman.

programme.title: The Memoirs of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes investigates the disappearance of Mary Cushing's sister.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Springtime in the Sierras
programme.desc: A gang of poachers must be stopped as they kill and sell game out of season. Roy figures out who the culprits are and goes undercover to investigate further.

programme.title: Through the Bible With Les Feldick
programme.desc: Les Feldick, an Oklahoma farmer and rancher with a special gift for teaching the Bible; his simple and nondenominational approach on the program "Through the Bible with Les Feldick" has reached millions around the world with the Gospel of Grace.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Clanton gang edges toward a showdown with the Earps.

programme.title: The First Traveling Saleslady

When Rose suggests that singer Molly Wade (Carol Channing) wear her daring new corset in her revue, the show is shut down. In debt to steel manufacturer Jim Carter (David Brian), Rose declares she can sell steel wire to stubborn cattle ranchers in Texas and clear her debt. Along the way, Rose is joined by Molly, inventor Charles Masters (Barry Nelson) and cattle baron Joel Kingdom (James Arness).

programme.title: Ten Wanted Men
programme.desc: Rancher John Stewart (Randolph Scott) prefers to resolve problems without falling back on violent solutions. However, fellow cattleman Wick Campbell (Richard Boone) isn't so peaceful, and he hires a team of armed mercenaries, led by ruthless Frank Scavo (Leo Gordon), to rid him of any possible competition. After narrowly surviving an attack from Scavo and his men, Stewart has little choice but to fight back in order to save both his ranch and his family, including nephew Howie (Skip Homeier).

programme.title: Seminole Uprising
programme.desc: An Army lieutenant (George Montgomery) is ordered to go after Florida Indians in Texas.

programme.title: One Foot in Heaven
programme.desc: After hearing an evangelist preach, William Spence (Fredric March) abandons his dream of becoming a doctor in favor of studying for the clergy. Once ordained, he and his new wife, Hope (Martha Scott), begin a series of moves from one small-town church to another, each with a new set of challenges, not the least of which is the general orneriness of their parishioners. Along the way, they have three children, and William gradually becomes more flexible about church doctrine.

programme.title: Salome
programme.desc: Princess Salome (Rita Hayworth) is the daughter of King Herod (Charles Laughton) of Galilee. Cast out after her affair with Caesar's nephew, Salome finds herself back in the kingdom of her father when she falls in love with Claudius (Stewart Granger), the commander of her father's army. Meanwhile, Salome's evil mother, Queen Herodias, is continually being condemned by John the Baptist, and plotting to use Salome as a tool to get the prophet executed.

programme.title: The Man Behind the Gun
programme.desc: An Army major goes undercover to stop a dangerous plot to make Southern California a separate state, facing immense personal risk and complex challenges.

programme.title: The Return of Wild Bill
programme.desc: Wild Bill Saunders comes home to help his father deal with troublesome ranchers.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Holmes and Watson match wits with an opera star intent on blackmailing a king.

programme.title: 1776 - 2026 250th Anniversary Quarter Celebration Program
programme.desc: 2026 will be one of the most historic years ever in U.S. coinage; join your host Mike Mezack to learn about the incredible U.S. Quarter program and get a chance at an exclusive P&D Roll!

programme.title: Daniel Boone
programme.desc: The frontiersman (George O'Brien) leads settlers to Kentucky, where a white renegade (John Carradine) unites tribes against them.

programme.title: Through the Bible With Les Feldick
programme.desc: Les Feldick, an Oklahoma farmer and rancher with a special gift for teaching the Bible; his simple and nondenominational approach on the program "Through the Bible with Les Feldick" has reached millions around the world with the Gospel of Grace.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: A homeless infant and a dance-hall queen create problems for Wyatt.

programme.title: Fort Osage
programme.desc: A scout (Rod Cameron) leads a wagon train through territory made hostile by a violated treaty.

programme.title: The Man Behind the Gun
programme.desc: An Army major goes undercover to stop a dangerous plot to make Southern California a separate state, facing immense personal risk and complex challenges.

programme.title: Seminole Uprising
programme.desc: An Army lieutenant (George Montgomery) is ordered to go after Florida Indians in Texas.

programme.title: Buchanan Rides Alone
programme.desc: Journeying from Mexico back home to West Texas, mercenary Tom Buchanan (Randolph Scott) takes a break for the night in the border town of Agry. He soon discovers that almost every resident -- from the crooked sheriff (Barry Kelley) to the shifty-eyed innkeeper -- is a member of the prominent Agry family. When Buchanan defends Juan de la Vega (Manuel Rojas), a young man about to be lynched for shooting the town drunk, he himself is accused of murder and must struggle to escape town alive.

programme.title: Strange Affair
programme.desc: Eminent psychiatrist Dr. Brenner (Erwin Kalser) invites cartoonist Bill Harrison (Allyn Joslyn) and his wife, Jack (Evelyn Keyes), to a banquet honoring war refugees. Bill volunteers to pick up fellow psychiatrist Dr. Baumler at the train station, but the man vanishes when he has Bill stop so he can use a pay phone. At the dinner, Bill and Jack are seated with Brenner's daughter, Freda (Nina Foch), and, to Bill's surprise, another man is introduced as Baumler -- who dies moments later.

programme.title: Murder, He Says
programme.desc: When a public opinion surveyor working in the mountain district town of Plainville goes missing, fellow surveyor Pete Marshall (Fred MacMurray) is sent as his replacement. Visiting the hillbilly family of Mamie Fleagle (Marjorie Main), Pete begins to suspect with horror that she and her two sons have murdered the surveyor. Pete then comes to believe that Mamie is slowly poisoning wealthy Grandma Fleagle, who has put a vital clue to her fortune in a nonsensical embroidered sampler.

programme.title: David and Bathsheba
programme.desc: King David and the beautiful Bathsheba's adulterous love risks David his throne, country and even the wrath of God. Told in occasional flashback, the film sees him conquer Goliath and lead his armies to victory before the prophet Nathan brings the word of Jehovah and His judgment, which sees David atone for his sins.

programme.title: Strange Affair
programme.desc: Eminent psychiatrist Dr. Brenner (Erwin Kalser) invites cartoonist Bill Harrison (Allyn Joslyn) and his wife, Jack (Evelyn Keyes), to a banquet honoring war refugees. programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Holmes links a murder in a quiet English house to a Chicago gangster.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp

programme.title: Kansas Pacific
programme.desc: With the American Civil War looming, construction of the Pacific railroad is being held up in Kansas, sabotaged by Confederate sympathizers. The government dispatches an Army engineer, John Nelson (Sterling Hayden), to oversee construction, and he initially rubs the wrong way both his proud boss (Barton MacLane) and his boss's feisty daughter (Eve Miller). Eventually, though, both fall for Nelson's charms, and the hero seeks to uncover the Southern rat so he can lead the Union men due west.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Doc Holliday recommends his former brother-in-law for a job as a deputy.

When Buchanan defends Juan de la Vega (Manuel Rojas), a young man about to be lynched for shooting the town drunk, he himself is accused of murder and must struggle to escape town alive.

programme.title: Taggart
programme.desc: Kent Taggart's family members, with their cattle stampeded, are killed by those who started it. In a fair gunfight, he kills the man's son responsible for it, and when he runs, a warrant is issued and a price is put on his head.

programme.title: Gunfight at the O.K. Corral
programme.desc: Lawman Wyatt Earp (Burt Lancaster) and gunfighter John "Doc" Holliday (Kirk Douglas) find themselves together again in Tombstone, Ariz., despite the tumultuous history between them. Earp comes to Arizona on a mission to bring the Clayton clan to justice. Meanwhile, Holliday becomes incensed with the decision of Kate Fisher (Jo Van Fleet) to turn him down in favor of another gunfighter (John Ireland), ultimately leading Holliday to join Earp's side in a confrontation with the Claytons.

programme.title: McLintock!
programme.desc: Aging rancher George Washington McLintock, a wealthy self-made man, is forced to deal with numerous personal and professional problems. Seemingly everyone wants a piece of his enormous farmstead, including high-ranking government men, McLintock's own sons and nearby Native Americans. As McLintock tries to juggle his various adversaries, his wife, who left him two years previously, suddenly returns. But she isn't interested in her husband -- she wants custody of their daughter.

programme.title: Ben-Hur
programme.desc: An enslaved Judean prince (Charlton Heston) meets his Roman betrayer (Stephen Boyd), a former friend, in a chariot race.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Holmes is called in when a top secret document is stolen from the British Foreign Office.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Wyatt plans to avoid a shoot-out.

programme.title: The Tall Texan
programme.desc: Sheriff Chadbourne (Samuel Herrick) transports convict Ben Trask (Lloyd Bridges) to El Paso in a covered wagon. The wagon also carries sea captain Theodore Bess (Lee J. Cobb) and married couple Laura (Marie Windsor) and Jerry Niblett (Dean Train). The group comes upon a wounded Native American, banished by his tribe, who offers to lead them to gold. But then the tribe attacks the wagon, killing Jerry and wounding Chadbourne. Ben is freed to help, but the group's troubles have only begun.

programme.title: The Story of Jacob and Joseph
programme.desc: Biblical dramas show Jacob (Keith Michell) and his twin, and Jacob's 11th son, Joseph (Tony Lo Bianco), who was sold by his brothers.

programme.title: Rio Lobo
programme.desc: Union leader Cord McNally is protecting a routine gold shipment when his troops are attacked by Confederate forces. Not only does he lose the gold, but one of his strongest officers is killed in the raid. At the end of the Civil War, McNally learns that the raiders had help from the inside, and he vows to uncover the two traitors. After a chance encounter with one of the turncoats, McNally travels to the town of Rio Lobo and makes an unexpected discovery.

programme.desc: The Sharp End: Ken helps some traders and Harry and Alex try to win a big security contract, but they soon find themselves at odds with their partner. S7 Ep7

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: The Last Video Show: Comedy-drama series about a loveable rogue and his reluctant sidekick. A video implicating two senior police officers is mistakenly returned to Daley Videos. S7 Ep4

programme.title: Underwater Grand Fishing Adventure
programme.desc: The final part of Ali Hamidi and Bobby Zamora's mission at Iktus in France kicks off on the cameras as the lads try to catch a koi each and a carp of 50 pounds or more. S1 Ep4

programme.desc: (2021) Found-footage supernatural horror. A young woman visits an Amish community to make a documentary about her family. But there's a good reason why her mum got her away from there...
